title: 2026-02-13 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 16.14
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-02-13: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 16.14/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2026-02-13, the score printed 16.14/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
